summary: Compulsion Engine K-Factor Boost Testing. Backend: 17/17 tests passed (100%). Critical frontend issue found: StoryVideoStudio route is NOT accessible without auth due to global 401 redirect handler in api.js. PublicCreation page works correctly with dual CTAs, cliffhanger teaser, and social proof. PublicCharacterPage error state works correctly (no test characters in DB to verify full UI).

critical.issue: Global 401 redirect handler in api.js (line 59-62) redirects unauthenticated users to /login when StoryVideoStudio makes API calls. This breaks the intended 'open access until generate' flow. Users cannot browse/fill the form without being redirected.

Clicking 'Continue Story' triggers navigation to /app/story-video-studio, which immediately redirects to /login due to the global 401 handler. remix_data may be stored but is cleared during the redirect flow.

action_items: P0 FIX: Modify /app/frontend/src/utils/api.js to NOT redirect to /login for routes that should be publicly accessible (e.g., /app/story-video-studio). Options: (1) Check current URL before redirect, (2) Add a whitelist of paths, (3) Use a flag/context to suppress redirect for specific components

P0 FIX: StoryVideoPipeline.js should gracefully handle 401 errors from /api/pipeline/options, /api/credits/check-upsell, /api/pipeline/user-jobs without breaking. These should fail silently for unauthenticated users.
VERIFY: After fix, test that unauthenticated user can: (1) Access /app/story-video-studio, (2) Fill in story text, (3) See auth gate only when clicking Generate button
critical_code_review_comments: api.js line 59-62: Global 401 redirect is too aggressive - breaks the growth funnel where StoryVideoStudio should be browsable without auth
StoryVideoPipeline.js calls multiple auth-required APIs on mount (loadUserJobs, checkUpsell, checkRateLimit) - these trigger the 401 redirect
App.js line 220 correctly does NOT wrap StoryVideoStudio with auth check: <Route path='/app/story-video-studio' element={<ErrorBoundary><StoryVideoPipeline /></ErrorBoundary>} />
The intended auth gate in StoryVideoStudio.js (line 521-541) never gets reached because 401 redirect happens first
PublicCreation.js correctly sets localStorage.setItem('remix_data') before navigate(), but the redirect happens so fast it may be cleared

success_rate.frontend: BLOCKED - Critical 401 redirect issue prevents testing StoryVideoStudio flow

context_for_next_testing_agent: Critical fix needed in api.js to allow StoryVideoStudio to be accessible without authentication. The route itself is not auth-gated (App.js line 220) but the global 401 handler in api.js redirects any unauthenticated user when API calls fail. Fix suggestion: Check if current path is '/app/story-video-studio' before redirecting on 401.

Backend_APIs.GET_public_character: VERIFIED - Returns 404 for non-existent, would return data for valid IDs
Backend_APIs.GET_public_creation: VERIFIED - Returns full creation data with social_proof, scenes, remix_data
Backend_APIs.GET_public_stats: VERIFIED - Returns creators count, videos_created, total_creations
Backend_APIs.GET_public_live_activity: VERIFIED - Returns activity feed with creator/action/type
Backend_APIs.GET_public_share_page: VERIFIED - Returns HTML with OG tags
Backend_APIs.GET_public_og_image: VERIFIED - Returns PNG image for social previews

Frontend_Pages.PublicCreation: VERIFIED - Shows dual CTAs (continue-story-btn, create-own-btn), cliffhanger teaser, social proof, share buttons
Frontend_Pages.PublicCharacterPage: PARTIALLY VERIFIED - Error state works (no test characters in DB)
Frontend_Pages.StoryVideoStudio: BLOCKED - Cannot test due to 401 redirect
Frontend_Pages.ExplorePage: VERIFIED - Shows 58 creations with trending/newest/most_remixed tabs

Growth_Funnel.Continue_Story_CTA_Flow: BROKEN - Redirects to /login instead of opening StoryVideoStudio

rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: Global 401 interceptor in api.js (lines 59-62) unconditionally redirects to /login on ANY 401 response. StoryVideoPipeline.js makes several API calls on mount (loadUserJobs, checkUpsell, checkRateLimit, api.get('/api/pipeline/options')) which return 401 for unauthenticated users, triggering the redirect.
reproduction_steps: 1. Go to /explore, click any creation card
2. On PublicCreation page, click 'Continue This Story' CTA
3. Observe redirect to /login instead of opening StoryVideoStudio
